languages.text: "Хорошее начало, но выводы делать рано. Осмотритесь на заставе внимательнее. Похоже, в деле замешана спешка. А такой союзник неизменно оставляет следы."

traits.locale_text: "Хорошее начало, но выводы делать рано. Осмотритесь на заставе внимательнее. Похоже, в деле замешана спешка. А такой союзник неизменно оставляет следы."

languages.text: "A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."
languages.original_text: "Хорошее начало, но выводы делать рано. Осмотритесь на заставе внимательнее. Похоже, в деле замешана спешка. А такой союзник неизменно оставляет следы."

traits.locale_text: "A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."
"A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."
"A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."

languages.text: “算是个不错的开端，但现在下结论还为时过早。再仔细搜查下前哨周围。这里面应该有个不起眼的小角色。而这种盟友，肯定会留下痕迹。”
languages.original_text: "A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."

traits.locale_text: “算是个不错的开端，但现在下结论还为时过早。再仔细搜查下前哨周围。这里面应该有个不起眼的小角色。而这种盟友，肯定会留下痕迹。”

languages.text: « C'est un bon début, mais il est encore trop tôt pour en tirer des conclusions. Passez le secteur de l'avant-poste au peigne fin. Apparemment, on a eu recours à quelque vulgaire sous-fifre et les seconds couteaux laissent toujours des traces derrière eux. »
languages.original_text: "A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."

traits.locale_text: « C'est un bon début, mais il est encore trop tôt pour en tirer des conclusions. Passez le secteur de l'avant-poste au peigne fin. Apparemment, on a eu recours à quelque vulgaire sous-fifre et les seconds couteaux laissent toujours des traces derrière eux. »

languages.text: "İyi bir başlangıç fakat bir sonuca varmak için henüz çok erken. Karakolun etrafına daha dikkatli bakmak gerek. Anlaşılan değersiz bir piyon işin içinde. Böyle bir müttefikin iz bırakmaması mümkün değil."
languages.original_text: "A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."

traits.locale_text: "İyi bir başlangıç fakat bir sonuca varmak için henüz çok erken. Karakolun etrafına daha dikkatli bakmak gerek. Anlaşılan değersiz bir piyon işin içinde. Böyle bir müttefikin iz bırakmaması mümkün değil."

languages.text: «Un buen comienzo, pero es muy pronto para sacar conclusiones. Investigue más en torno al puesto avanzado. Parece que hay un miserable peón involucrado. Un aliado así tiene que dejar rastro».
languages.original_text: "A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."

traits.locale_text: «Un buen comienzo, pero es muy pronto para sacar conclusiones. Investigue más en torno al puesto avanzado. Parece que hay un miserable peón involucrado. Un aliado así tiene que dejar rastro».

languages.text: "Ein guter Anfang, aber für Schlussfolgerungen ist es noch zu früh. Seht Euch am Außenposten um. Wie es aussieht, war ein niederer Bauer involviert. Und ein solcher Verbündeter hinterlässt für gewöhnlich Beweise."
languages.original_text: "A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."

traits.locale_text: "Ein guter Anfang, aber für Schlussfolgerungen ist es noch zu früh. Seht Euch am Außenposten um. Wie es aussieht, war ein niederer Bauer involviert. Und ein solcher Verbündeter hinterlässt für gewöhnlich Beweise."

languages.text: 「いいスタートだが、結論を下すにはまだ早すぎる。要塞の周辺をもっとよく見てみよう。低級な駒が関わっているようだ。そして、そんな味方は証拠を残すに違いない。」
languages.original_text: "A good start, but it's too early to draw any conclusions. Look more closely around the outpost. It seems a lowly pawn was involved. And an ally like that is bound to leave evidence."

traits.locale_text: 「いいスタートだが、結論を下すにはまだ早すぎる。要塞の周辺をもっとよく見てみよう。低級な駒が関わっているようだ。そして、そんな味方は証拠を残すに違いない。」
